entries.title: Discover the earth’s continents, the changing seasons, latitude and longitude, map-making, and topographical features. Use a globe, wall maps, and models to explore the concept of place by taking an in-depth look at “home” in North America. Students make models and maps of places that are important to them such as their room, home, and yard.
entries.label: Discover the earth’s continents, the changing seasons, latitude and longitude, map-making, and topographical features. Use a globe, wall maps, and models to explore the concept of place by taking an in-depth look at “home” in North America. Students make models and maps of places that are important to them such as their room, home, and yard.
entries.content: All students in Grade 1 should take this course. Students in Grades 2-3 who have never studied geography may also benefit, though they could likely work at a faster pace.
